scenario_name: Scenario 11 — Floating Point in Financial Calculation
justification: All pass criteria met: floating-point identified as Critical with specific numeric example (33.33*3), fix recommends integer cents or decimal.js, NaN propagation noted as Important issue, safe_to_deploy is false. The bank-transfer context is clearly understood as higher severity than display-only. Additionally found valuable issues beyond the rubric (negative payouts, idempotency).

observations.text: Floating-point issue correctly classified as Critical with clear reasoning about bank transfer context
Fix specifies both integer cents and decimal.js as alternatives, plus Math.round as minimum
NaN propagation from null/undefined fields identified with recommendation to validate or default to 0
safe_to_deploy is false with clear deployment risk explanation
Found additional critical issues (negative payouts, idempotency) demonstrating thorough review
NaN issue classified as Important rather than Critical — given it causes silent bank transfer failure, Critical would be more appropriate
No explicit contrast with display-only context, though the bank transfer severity is clearly understood from the analysis
